title: The Sneak
teaching_point: Long-acting insulin has a quiet tail — it's still working hours after injection even when you can't feel it.

scenes.visual_note: Gatiep looks nervous, asking a question
scenes.subtitle_text: MiraAi, something's making my sugar drop and I can't see what.
scenes.voice_text: MiraAi, something's making my sugar drop and I can't see what.

scenes.subtitle_text: Ah, that's The Sneak. Let me show you.
scenes.voice_text: Ah, that's The Sneak. Let me show you.

scenes.visual_note: IOB tail highlighted — insulin still active hours later
scenes.subtitle_text: Your insulin is still working here, even though it's been hours. It's sneaky like that.
scenes.voice_text: See this part? Your insulin is still working here, even though it's been hours. It's sneaky like that.
